heroTitle: Delivery content you can manage from admin
heroSubtitle: GoGet connects customers, merchants, and couriers with a single content source so the homepage can be updated without editing code.

features.title: Single JSON source
features.desc: Homepage content is loaded from data/site.json for simple CMS-style control.

features.title: Fast admin editing
features.desc: Update the hero title and subtitle from the admin page and save directly to disk.

features.title: Reusable API access
features.desc: The same content is available through GET and POST endpoints for future integrations.
